final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0001;
        end else begin
            count <= {count[2:0], count[3]};
        end
    end

endmodule
